# Maa Harsiddhi Electronics

> Professional Piano, Keyboard & Electronics Repair Service in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

## Identity
- **Business Name:** Maa Harsiddhi Electronics
- **Owners:** Navinbhai & Dharmesh
- **Experience:** 20+ years of hands-on electronics repair
- **Location:** 1321-10, Darji Ni Chali, Amdupura, D Colony, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 382345, India
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 9624960835
- **Google Maps:** https://maps.app.goo.gl/ZrcffZKRru4s26Wc7

## What We Do
Maa Harsiddhi Electronics is a trusted, family-run electronics repair workshop in Ahmedabad specializing in:
- Piano Repair (acoustic and electronic)
- Keyboard Repair (all brands: Yamaha, Casio, Roland, Korg, Kawai, Nord, Kurzweil, Akai, M-Audio)
- Amplifier Repair
- Speaker Repair
- Audio System Repair
- General Electronics Repair
- Power Supply Repair
- Circuit Board / PCB-level Repair

## Brands We Repair
Yamaha, Casio, Roland, Korg, Kawai, Nord, Kurzweil, Akai, M-Audio, Alesis, Suzuki, and all other electronic keyboard and piano brands.

## Services Offered
- Key replacement and keybed repair
- Rubber contact strip cleaning and replacement
- Circuit board (PCB) diagnosis and SMD-level soldering
- Speaker cone and crossover network repair
- Internal power supply repair
- Headphone jack, audio output, USB, and MIDI port repair
- LCD/Display screen replacement and backlight repair
- Water damage recovery (disassembly, ultrasonic cleaning, corrosion treatment)
- Amplifier troubleshooting and repair (tube and solid-state)
- Annual preventive maintenance and deep cleaning

## Service Area
Ahmedabad, Amdupura, Shahibaug, Bapunagar, Naroda, Saraspur, Kalupur, D Colony, Rakhial, Gomtipur, Dariapur, Khadia, Maninagar, Nikol, Odhav, Vastral, Gota, Chandkheda, Satellite, Paldi, Navrangpura — and all areas across Ahmedabad, Gujarat.
